update after_sale_item
after_sale_code = #{afterSaleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
after_sale_item_code = #{afterSaleItemCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item_code = #{orderItemCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_sku_code = #{productSkuCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_sku_id = #{productSkuId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
spec_info = #{specInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_name = #{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_code = #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
product_image = #{productImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sale_price = #{salePrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
after_sale_num = #{afterSaleNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
after_sale_price = #{afterSalePrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
apply_after_sale_price = #{applyAfterSalePrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update after_sale_item set after_sale_code = #{afterSaleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, after_sale_item_code = #{afterSaleItemCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item_code = #{orderItemCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_sku_code = #{productSkuCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_sku_id = #{productSkuId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, spec_info = #{specInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_name = #{productName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_code = #{productCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, product_image = #{productImage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sale_price = #{salePrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, after_sale_num = #{afterSaleNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, after_sale_price = #{afterSalePrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, apply_after_sale_price = #{applyAfterSalePrice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
